# CWE-178 positive: inconsistent case handling for resource lookup (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-178-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

var permittedVolumes = map[string]bool{
	"archive": true,
	"shared":  true,
}

// CWE-178 Improper Handling of Case Sensitivity
// Vulnerable line: compares lowered input against mixed-case map keys.
func AccessVolume(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	volume := strings.ToLower(r.PathValue("volume"))
	if !permittedVolumes[volume] {
		http.Error(w, "denied", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"volume": volume})
}
